judge_scores.reasoning: A resposta está incorreta e confiante: o maior pico de desmatamento da Amazônia no século 21 ocorreu em 2004, no primeiro governo Lula, não no governo Bolsonaro.
It incorrectly claims Bolsonaro had the highest 21st-century deforestation, whereas INPE PRODES shows the peak was in 2004 under Lula’s first term (~27,772 km²).

The response incorrectly states that Bolsonaro's government (2019-2022) had the highest 21st-century deforestation, when the ground truth clearly establishes that Lula's first government in 2004 had the peak at 27,772 km² according to INPE PRODES data.
